_readme: IMAGE PROMPT LIBRARY - shared across all VRA gateway sites
This file is identical in every site repo. Edit master, then propagate to sites.
DO NOT edit per-site. Changes here improve all sites on next image regeneration.
suffix: appended to every prompt automatically.
No emoji or special characters in this file.
suffix: Photorealistic DSLR photography, warm natural lighting with soft highlights on faces, rich colour grading, shallow depth of field. Subjects should be prominently featured and clearly visible, attractive and fit Australian adults aged 28 to 45, warm genuine smiles or confident relaxed expressions, looking toward the camera or mid-conversation, professionally dressed and well-groomed. Equipment must be either a discreet Bluetooth headset with boom microphone, a compact gooseneck desktop microphone, or the subject speaking directly into a laptop built-in microphone. Never show a large bulky studio microphone, never a podcast-style microphone, never a Yeti or Yeti-style microphone. No text overlays, no logos, no UI mockups, no watermarks, no stock-photo cliches, no empty rooms.
heroSuffix: Landscape hero banner composition, subject fills the frame with environmental context, editorial commercial photography style.
breakSuffix: Editorial supporting image, people must be visible and central to the composition, warm premium atmosphere.

doctor-surgery.label: Doctor surgery / GP clinic
doctor-surgery.hero: Attractive fit female GP aged 32-42, wearing a discreet Bluetooth headset with boom mic, seated at a modern desk in an Australian GP clinic, reviewing clinical notes on a monitor while dictating, warm confident smile toward the camera, softly blurred clinic background.
doctor-surgery.break: Attractive fit female GP aged 32-42 working at a modern clinic desk with a compact gooseneck desktop microphone and laptop, glancing toward the camera with a warm smile, clinic environment softly blurred behind her, warm natural window light.
doctor-surgery.altHero: Australian GP using voice recognition software in a modern clinic
doctor-surgery.altBreak: Australian GP at a clinic workstation using voice dictation hardware

hospital-office.label: Hospital specialist / clinical office
hospital-office.hero: Attractive fit male specialist doctor aged 35-45, wearing a Bluetooth headset with boom mic, standing at a height-adjustable workstation in a modern hospital office, dictating while reviewing imaging on a large monitor, confident relaxed expression, busy hospital softly blurred behind glass partition.
hospital-office.break: Attractive fit male specialist doctor aged 35-45 in a hospital office, mid-dictation into a discreet Bluetooth headset, warm smile toward camera, clinical workstation and corridor softly blurred behind him, strong clinical daylight.
hospital-office.altHero: Hospital specialist using speech recognition for clinical notes
hospital-office.altBreak: Australian hospital specialist dictating using a Bluetooth headset

lawyer-office.label: Lawyer / legal office
lawyer-office.hero: Attractive fit female lawyer aged 32-42, elegant business attire, seated at a large desk in a high-rise legal office, dictating into a compact gooseneck desktop microphone while reviewing legal documents on screen, warm confident smile, city skyline softly blurred through floor-to-ceiling windows, warm backlighting.
lawyer-office.break: Attractive fit male lawyer aged 35-45, tailored suit, standing at a desk in a law firm office, dictating toward a compact gooseneck desktop microphone while reviewing a document on screen, confident smile toward camera, skyline softly blurred behind, rich warm afternoon light.
lawyer-office.altHero: Australian lawyer dictating legal documents using voice recognition in a city office
lawyer-office.altBreak: Australian lawyer using a desktop microphone to dictate legal documents

legal-team.label: Legal team / law firm meeting
legal-team.hero: Small team of attractive fit adult Australian legal professionals aged 30-45 in a modern law firm meeting room, one dictating into a compact gooseneck desktop microphone while others review on a shared screen, collaborative warm atmosphere, genuine smiles, city skyline visible through windows.
legal-team.break: Two attractive fit Australian lawyers aged 32-45 collaborating at a desk in a law firm, one wearing a Bluetooth headset with boom mic, both engaged with warm smiles, document visible on a laptop between them, warm professional lighting.
legal-team.altHero: Australian legal team collaborating using voice recognition software
legal-team.altBreak: Two Australian lawyers collaborating at a desk using voice dictation

office-general.break: Attractive fit professional aged 30-42 at an ergonomic workstation in an open-plan Australian office, mid-conversation while dictating into a laptop, warm confident expression, colleagues softly blurred in background, natural daylight.

office-general.altBreak: Australian professional dictating into a laptop in a modern open-plan office

office-executive.break: Attractive fit female executive aged 35-45 at an executive desk, wearing a discreet Bluetooth headset with boom mic, reviewing documents on a laptop, warm genuine smile toward camera, premium office environment softly blurred, warm directional light.
office-executive.altHero: Australian executive dictating using voice recognition in a premium corporate office
office-executive.altBreak: Australian executive using a Bluetooth headset to dictate in a premium office

government-office.break: Two attractive fit Australian public sector professionals aged 32-45 at a shared workstation, one wearing a Bluetooth headset with boom mic, both engaged with warm smiles, document visible on monitor, professional warm lighting.
